name: Pesto White Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475 degrees.
2. Mix parsley, basil, garlic, broth, olive oil, and 1 tablespoon Parmesan until combined.
3. Spread pizza dough with pesto.
4. In a medium bowl, combine ricotta cheese, mozzarella, milk, and remaining 1 tablespoon Parmesan.
5. Spread the cheese mixture evenly over the pesto.
6. Arrange tomato slices over the cheese.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, until the crust is golden.
Note: Exchanges: 1/2 FA, 1 1/2 P, 1/2 V. 1 1/2 B, 10 cal. Per serving: 170 cal, 5 gm fat.
